nasb.text: so that on the contrary you should rather forgive and comfort him, otherwise such a one might be overwhelmed by excessive sorrow.

esv.text: so you should rather turn to forgive and comfort him, or he may be overwhelmed by excessive sorrow.

cnv.text: 倒不如饒恕他，安慰他，免得他因憂愁過度而受不了。

ccb.text: 你们现在要饶恕他、安慰他，免得他忧伤过度而一蹶不振。

csbs.text: 所以，你们反而更要饶恕他、安慰他，免得他被过度的忧伤吞没了。
